description_long: This is a classic claw hammer featuring a metallic head and a long, straight handle. The head is composed of a flat striking face on one side and a curved claw on the opposite side, designed for pulling nails. The handle is primarily metallic with two distinct orange grip sections, likely rubberized for enhanced comfort and slip resistance. The hammer's proportions suggest it is suitable for one-handed use, typical for carpentry or general urban repair tasks. The metallic surfaces have a matte, slightly reflective finish, while the grip areas appear textured for improved handling. No visible branding, wear, or additional attachments are present, giving the hammer a clean and utilitarian appearance.
description: A metallic claw hammer with a straight handle and orange rubberized grip sections, featuring a flat striking face and a curved claw for nail removal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the hammer, with the flat striking face and the curved claw clearly visible, as well as the orange grip sections on the handle.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the split claw and the handle's orange grip, with the head's width and claw curvature more pronounced.
description_view_2: Profile view emphasizing the hammer's head, especially the flat striking face and the pronounced curve of the claw, with the handle's grip visible.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the head's width and the split claw, with the handle extending away and the orange grip sections partially visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight metallic handle with orange and black rubberized grip sections for enhanced comfort and slip resistance.
attribute_head_type: Claw hammer head with a flat striking face on one side and a curved, split claw on the other for nail removal.
